title: Iceye raises 1 billion euros to expand SAR satellite systems
description:
Iceye, a Finnish company that develops and operates radar imaging satellites, has raised more than 1 billion euros in a round that values it at more than 10 billion euros.

title: Isar Aerospace raises 270 million euros for global launch expansion
description:

title: Anthropic Funding Pushed Startup Investment To Near-Record Levels In May As Exit Market Reopened
description: All told, global venture funding reached $92 billion in May, marking the second-largest monthly total on record, just behind February, Crunchbase data shows. Of that, Anthropic raised $50 billion, or 54% of the month’s total funding.

title: When Refusal Doesn’t Matter: Operation Epic Fury and the Erosion of Host Nation Consent
description: When the U.S. military launched its war against Iran in Feb. 2026, it did not just dismantle Iranian military capabilities.
